_source: Curated from a saved LinkedIn webarchive (2026-06). NOT live-fetched — this file is the contract (content tokens / slugs for copy). Edit here; the site renders from these slugs.
name: Robert DeLanghe
headline: I build the security layer for agentic systems.
summary: The machinery that lets software be delivered by agents but governed like infrastructure — capability-based security where every privileged effect is verified against a signed owner. The harder problem, keeping many agent-authored components honest as they evolve, is prx and the bounded-systems libraries.

experience.what: Architected the contract-and-validation layer behind inventory-purchasing: one source of truth, CI drift-gated across 130+ components, delivered as agent-authored PRs.
bullets: Architected the contract-and-validation layer replacing Aura's spreadsheet-driven supply plan (the system behind inventory-purchasing): a compile-and-publish model where one source of truth generates every downstream surface — schemas, docs, tests, agent context — CI drift-gated so nothing falls out of sync.
Made the pipeline auditable by construction across 130+ components — provenance and contract checks gating every output, sign-off bound to an owner-role enforced in CI rather than to individuals.
Drove it as agent-authored delivery: every change moves through one auditable pipeline to a reviewed PR, applying the same provenance-and-contract discipline to the agents' own output.

experience.what: Front-end & developer experience: a design system (−30% task lead time), static-analysis PR gating (−20% critical bugs), and perf work (−95% page loads).
bullets: Built static-analysis gating into the PR pipeline — blocking defects before merge, cutting critical bugs ~20% and high-priority issues ~25% across a 20-engineer team.
Led a Design System rollout with Design & Product — reducing task lead time ~30% (Vue, Figma, Sass, design tokens).
Re-engineered pagination/infinite-scroll in a key component library — page loads from ~30s to near-instant (~95% faster).
Built a flexible dashboard framework — shortening widget development from a week to a day (~70% faster).

experience.org: Pioneer Works · Kaleida Studio · The Prepared
experience.what: Built CRMs, ETL pipelines, and production-automation systems for arts & media orgs — APIs, data, and workflow tooling.
bullets: Designed and shipped a unified CRM + Square-API ETL — cut payment-tracking ~80% and enabled profit-loss reporting across 200+ events (Pioneer Works).
Automated just-in-time production and notifications — eliminated edition-numbering errors and cut shipping lead times from 7 days to 2 (Kaleida Studio).
Built a content pipeline + Airtable schema that cut curation time ~70% across 1000+ articles (The Prepared).

experience.what: Studied type theory in Haskell — making invalid states unrepresentable; the foundation for the contract/capability work now.
bullets: Studied type theory in Haskell — algebraic data types, typeclasses, and using the type system to make invalid states unrepresentable.

education.what: Computational & parametric design — algorithmic design for digital fabrication.

seeking.label: Open to new roles
seeking.focus: Capability security · agent infrastructure · platform engineering
seeking.detail: Senior / staff engineering where correctness, security, and provenance matter. Brooklyn · NYC · remote.
